answer: We do not hear your raft next to you

answer: Your clams do not see our owl above us

reasoning: ‘man yaih’ (you make), ‘sumalu palani’ (the dog’s raft), ‘was yak’ (next to the water).

answer: kuring wainikuu pinkisli manna yamak yak
manna kaswimat yangna walakibis balna palani yak
reasoning: ‘manna’ (you [pl]), ‘kaswimat’ (do not eat), ‘yangna walakibis balna’ (our bananas), ‘palani yak’ (at a raft).
